body:
This PR:
- Uses the newer non-conservative interpolation scheme introduce in ClimaCore. This scheme is significantly faster, especially on GPUs. (Closes #2641)
- Removes support to `interpolate_over_msl` (removed from ClimaCore). The range of zs provided will be always interpreted as reference zs
- Unconditionally adds `z_physical` to NetCDF, regarless of the hypsography used. (Closes #2553). Note, `z_physical` won't be very accurate for first points as typically they all within the same element (and no interpolation is performed in this case).
- Updates to ClimaCore 0.13 (needed for the new interpolator)

This PR seems indimidating, but most of the changes are renaming internal variables, updating manifests, and so on.
title: Use faster interpolation in NetCDF writer
Update to CMv0.17 (old parameters, no kwargs)
